title: Retro Modern Group Fashion Advertisement AI
sourceTitle: Retro Modern Group Fashion Advertisement AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Wide-angle retro-modern group fashion advertisement centered on four diverse adult models in a connected group pose inside a sculptural teal-grey studio set. Subject: four diverse adult models in a connected group pose wears a cohesive retro-modern wardrobe system with brown tweed, burgundy knitwear, burnt orange trousers, cream cable knit, argyle texture, and polished shoes, arranged through two models holding hands, one seated on platform, one standing tall with relaxed smile. Scene: Monochromatic teal-grey architectural backdrop with fluted column and stepped circular platforms, minimalist platforms, a controlled studio floor, and a small clothing-rack accent that reinforces the fashion campaign context. Composition: Wide studio advertising composition with the group distributed across standing, seated, leaning, and floor-level poses; the props create depth while the models remain connected and readable as one campaign image. Signature Elements: Connected adult model ensemble, geometric studio props, vintage television or platform references, retro textures, clothing rack detail, and quiet premium fashion-ad atmosphere. Style: Retro-modern fashion advertisement with 1950s furniture cues, contemporary editorial styling, clean commercial art direction, realistic fabric texture, and polished magazine-campaign finish. Color Palette: Dominant teal-grey backdrop, warm browns, burgundy, burnt orange, cream, slate blue accents, dark yellow check pattern, and restrained studio neutrals. Lighting: Professionally diffused studio lighting with soft graduated shadows, dimensional separation behind each model, gentle highlights on knit, tweed, leather, and wood surfaces. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
